note: Real runtime capture — fresh/clean first-turn session, identifier-masked.
systemPrompt:
You are the live GPT orchestration intelligence inside Brainstyworkers' LangGraph healthcare insurance concierge.
Return strict JSON only. Do not include markdown.
LangGraph is the healthcare workflow master. You advise LangGraph, and LangGraph will enforce safety, approval, worker, and memory rules.
Allowed workflows: eligibility_benefits_navigation, claim_status_navigation, pharmacy_formulary, prior_authorization_navigation, denial_appeal_preparation, payer_portal_read_only_extraction, document_or_trace_review, human_approval_escalation.
Never select a workflow outside that list.
Never authorize credential entry, SSN entry, 2FA/passkey handling, payer contact, external messaging, form submission, payment, cancellation, record change, or medical advice.
OpenClaw workers may be powerful inside the delegated read-only task, but they do not choose the healthcare workflow.
If authenticated portal evidence is needed, ask for manual login/readiness and read-only approval rather than claiming evidence exists.
If source pointers are absent, say what evidence is missing.
Reason as a PROCESS: if you cannot answer now (no evidence, or you need user/plan details), set capabilityAssessment.canAnswerNow=false, set userDataSufficiency, set responseStrategy='offer_process_and_ask', set clarificationNeeded=true with a concrete userFacingNextQuestion, and populate offeredProcessIds/recommendedProcessId from offerableProcesses (never invent a process id not in that list).
A member's CURRENT / real-time figures — out-of-pocket balance or maximum, deductible balance, accumulators, copay/coinsurance owed, claim-specific amounts, or 'what do I still owe' — CANNOT be known from research/policy/general evidence; they require authenticated portal evidence. For ANY such current-balance/amount question, set canAnswerNow=false and responseStrategy='offer_process_and_ask' (offer the portal-lookup process) EVEN IF research or policy evidence is present. Research/policy evidence supports only general coverage explanations, never a live balance.
If you can answer from cited evidence (general coverage/policy facts that are actually present), set canAnswerNow=true and responseStrategy='answer_from_evidence'.

hydratedPlannerInput.purpose: Choose the healthcare insurance workflow and worker strategy for LangGraph. Deterministic safety gates already ran first.
hydratedPlannerInput.userInput: hey, can you help me to discover my current out of the pocket?

curatedClassifier.rationale: No high-specificity workflow signal matched; defaulted to eligibility and benefits as the first MVP journey.

matches.title: Temporary Claim Journey Skill
questionsToSolve: Which claim or visit is the user asking about?
Is there a stored claim item, EOB/document pointer, portal page pointer, or trusted reviewed evidence?
What is the claim status, service date, billed/allowed/paid/share amount, and denial or adjustment reason?
Does the result require more evidence, human review, or an approval-gated next action?

matches.title: Temporary Aetna Insurance Plan Skill
questionsToSolve: What Aetna plan evidence is needed to answer this user question?
Can existing session, memory, source-pointer, or trusted research evidence answer the question?
Does the user need authenticated portal evidence before LangGraph can answer?
Which source hierarchy should govern conflicting Aetna evidence?

promptTable.title: Read-only insurer portal lookup
promptTable.whenToUse: a payer-portal data request when a portal account exists but no fresh evidence is cached
promptTable.whyUse: the default spine to obtain plan-specific data without the agent ever entering credentials
promptTable.shortDescription: You log in yourself; I read and cite what's on screen.

promptTable.title: Claim status, EOB, patient responsibility, why-billed.
promptTable.whenToUse: user asks status of a claim / why was I billed / patient responsibility
promptTable.whyUse: routes claim/EOB questions to the claim journey
promptTable.shortDescription: Claim status, EOB, patient responsibility, why-billed.

promptTable.title: Coverage, deductible, OOP max, copay lookup.
promptTable.whenToUse: user asks about coverage / what they owe / deductible / OOP / effective dates
promptTable.whyUse: routes benefit + cost-sharing questions to the eligibility journey
promptTable.shortDescription: Coverage, deductible, OOP max, copay lookup.

promptTable.title: Drug coverage, tier, step therapy, alternatives.
promptTable.whenToUse: user asks is my drug covered / tier / copay / alternatives
promptTable.shortDescription: Drug coverage, tier, step therapy, alternatives.

promptTable.title: Prior-auth status and payer requirements.
promptTable.whenToUse: user asks do I need pre-auth / PA status / approval requirement

promptTable.title: Interpret uploaded EOB/SBC/ID/denial documents.
promptTable.whenToUse: user uploads a document to interpret; no login needed
promptTable.whyUse: routes to local document extraction + review

promptTable.title: Read-only structured extraction from an authenticated portal.
promptTable.whenToUse: specific plan data only available behind portal login
promptTable.whyUse: drives the read-only observation after user takeover login
promptTable.shortDescription: Read-only structured extraction from an authenticated portal.

promptTable.title: Understand a denial and assemble appeal support (draft only).
promptTable.whenToUse: denied claim/PA; understand grounds and assemble support
promptTable.whyUse: composes claim + document + policy lookups; draft only, never sends
promptTable.shortDescription: Understand a denial and assemble appeal support (draft only).

promptTable.title: Execution arm: OBSERVE a user-authenticated portal (read-only).
promptTable.whenToUse: portal evidence is needed after the user logs in
promptTable.whyUse: the OpenClaw read-only browser skill; never enters credentials
promptTable.shortDescription: Execution arm: OBSERVE a user-authenticated portal (read-only).

promptTable.title: Research authoritative published insurance/policy sources.
promptTable.whenToUse: a fact is published (formulary/SBC/policy) and not behind login

promptTable.title: Dispatch handle for the OpenClaw browser arm.
promptTable.whenToUse: a worker dispatch to the read-only browser is required
promptTable.shortDescription: Dispatch handle for the OpenClaw browser arm.

promptTable.title: Structured read-only portal extraction to source pointers.
promptTable.whenToUse: portal page content must be turned into cited evidence
promptTable.shortDescription: Structured read-only portal extraction to source pointers.

promptTable.title: Aetna clinical policy bulletin criteria.
promptTable.whenToUse: PA/appeal needs payer clinical policy criteria
promptTable.whyUse: retrieves CPB criteria with citation, no PHI sent

promptTable.title: Parse uploaded EOB/SBC/denial artifacts.
promptTable.whenToUse: an uploaded document must be parsed to structured fields

promptTable.title: Native HITL approval pause before worker/write.
promptTable.whenToUse: read-only worker execution needs explicit human approval
promptTable.whyUse: native LangGraph interrupt + resume on approval token
promptTable.shortDescription: Native HITL approval pause before worker/write.

promptTable.title: Cited answer once trusted source pointers exist.
promptTable.whenToUse: trusted source pointers exist and can be cited
promptTable.shortDescription: Cited answer once trusted source pointers exist.

promptTable.title: Safety-gated LLM planner entry path.
promptTable.whenToUse: entry path for any chat after safety gates pass

offerableProcesses.title: Read-only insurer portal lookup
offerableProcesses.whenToUse: a payer-portal data request when a portal account exists but no fresh evidence is cached
offerableProcesses.whyUse: the default spine to obtain plan-specific data without the agent ever entering credentials

expectedJsonShape.workflow: one of the allowed workflow keys
expectedJsonShape.rationale: short reason based on user message, memory, and available evidence
expectedJsonShape.workerGoal: specific OpenClaw task goal inside the selected workflow
expectedJsonShape.responseStrategy: one of: answer_from_evidence | offer_process_and_ask | honest_capability_decline | degraded_best_effort
expectedJsonShape.userFacingNextQuestion: REQUIRED non-empty question when clarificationNeeded is true; otherwise empty string

capabilityAssessment.canAnswerNow: boolean: can you answer from existing evidence now?

missingPlanDetails: specific user/plan details you still need, e.g. which_payer_portal, member_id
expectedJsonShape.clarificationNeeded: boolean: do you need to ask the user something before proceeding?
offeredProcessIds: process ids chosen from offerableProcesses to OFFER the user
expectedJsonShape.recommendedProcessId: the single best process id from offerableProcesses, or empty
priorLlmOutputPointersUsed: LLM output index pointers consulted, if any

plannerDecisionOutput.rationale: User is asking about their current out-of-pocket amount, which always requires authenticated portal evidence because it is a live, member-specific figure not available from general research or policy sources.
plannerDecisionOutput.workerGoal: Observe the authenticated member portal in read-only mode to retrieve the current out-of-pocket amount.
plannerDecisionOutput.userFacingNextQuestion: To see your current out-of-pocket amount, can you log in to your insurer’s portal and approve a read-only observation? I’ll guide you through the secure read-only lookup.

capabilityAssessment.reason: Live out-of-pocket balances are never available from research or policy documentation; they require a current authenticated portal lookup.
limitations: Cannot state your current out-of-pocket balance without authenticated portal evidence.
General coverage, deductible, or OOP maximums can be explained if requested, but will not reflect your real-time status.
